hero.name: Swalih Abdullah
hero.subtitle: Graphic designer bridging the discipline of law with the art of visual storytelling.

about.title: About
about.bio: I'm Swalih Abdullah — a law student by day and a graphic designer in every other waking hour. I believe that the rigour of legal thinking and the freedom of creative expression aren't opposites — they're complementary forces. My work lives at that intersection: structured yet expressive, precise yet imaginative.

timeline.desc1: Delivering branding, editorial, and social media design for diverse clients.
timeline.desc2: Started as an intern for the education institution pro-bono and earned experience.
timeline.desc3: Started learning graphic designing and computer just to satisfy curiosity, but later it became a passion.

tools.sectionSubtitle: Free tools built for graphic designers.
tools.swabColoursDesc: Explore color theory, harmonies, and preview colors in real designs.
tools.swabLibraryDesc: Browse 1000+ curated color palettes across dozens of categories.

swabColours.title: swab
swabColours.subtitle: All-in-one color tool for graphic designers. Explore color theory, harmonies, palettes, and preview colors in real contexts.
swabColours.complementaryDesc: Opposite on the color wheel — high contrast and vibrant.
swabColours.analogousDesc: Side-by-side hues — naturally harmonious and calm.
swabColours.triadicDesc: Three evenly spaced hues — balanced and colorful.
swabColours.splitComplementaryDesc: Base + two adjacent to complement — softer contrast.
swabColours.tetradicDesc: Four hues in a rectangle — rich and varied.
swabColours.monochromaticDesc: Single hue with varied lightness — elegant and unified.
